response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong leadership, mentoring, and infrastructure experience. However, the role has critical technical requirements he does not meet: the position demands 8 years of C++ programming as a minimum qualification, and his resume shows only 1-2 years of C++ work across short tenures at National Instruments and Altom, with primary expertise in JavaScript/TypeScript and D. Additionally, while he has cloud and DevOps exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes), there is no evidence of leading or owning a large-scale cloud compute platform—his infrastructure experience is primarily application-level. These gaps are fundamental blockers for a mid-senior technical lead role.
strengths: Proven leadership progression with multiple Staff roles and mentoring across teams; currently Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq
Strong distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with microservices, async I/O, and low-latency architecture
Excellent engineering culture and practices foundation: organized TDD dojos, CI/CD pipeline expertise, Docker/Kubernetes deployment, and software craftsmanship methods
concerns: Severe C++ gap: ~1-2 years of C++ experience (National Instruments 6mo, some Altom work) versus 8-year minimum requirement; primary career built on JavaScript/TypeScript and D
No demonstrated cloud platform leadership: infrastructure experience limited to application-level DevOps (CI/CD setup, GitLab) rather than designing/owning compute platforms
Cloud architecture depth unclear: AWS CDK mentioned only for pricing optimization at one company; no evidence of large-scale cloud platform design or production cloud infrastructure decisions
